{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 2009
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 2009
|image           =
|imagesize       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = March 14 - July 1
|num_teams       = 64
|champions       = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]
|runner-up       = [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]
|matches         = 115
|goals           = 315
|top goal scorer = [[Taison Barcellos Freda|Taison]] (7 goals)<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.rsssf.org/tablesb/brazcup09.html|title = Brazil Cup 2009}}</ref>
|player          = 
|prevseason      = [[2008 Copa do Brasil|2008]]
|nextseason      = [[2010 Copa do Brasil|2010]]
}}

The '''2009 [[Copa do Brasil]]''' was the 21st edition of the [[Copa do Brasil]]. It began on February 18 and ended on July 1.

==Format==
The tournament is played in six stages, with two teams playing a [[two-legged tie]] in each stage. In the first two rounds, if the away team wins the first match by at least a 2-goal difference, it will move towards next round. The [[away goals rule]] is also used in the Copa do Brasil. The winner will qualify to the [[2010 Copa Libertadores]], which prevents them from participating in [[2010 Copa do Brasil|next year's Copa do Brasil]].

==Qualified teams==
The 2009 edition was contested by 64 teams. 54 clubs qualified through their respective state championship or some other competition. The number of berth given to each state (one, two, or three) is determined through [[Brazilian Football Confederation|CBF]]'s state ranking.<ref>{{Cite web |url=http://www.cbf.com.br/ranking/ranking_uf.pdf |title=CBF State Ranking - official site |access-date=2008-11-19 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20091014095018/http://www.cbf.com.br/ranking/ranking_uf.pdf |archive-date=2009-10-14 |url-status=dead }}</ref> Criteria may vary, but usually state federations indicate clubs with best records in the state championships or other special competitions organized by such institutions. The remaining ten clubs qualified through CBF's club ranking.<ref>[http://www.cbf.com.br/ranking/ranking.pdf CBF Club Ranking - official site] {{webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20090117065212/http://www.cbf.com.br/ranking/ranking.pdf |date=2009-01-17 }}</ref> Clubs that participated in the [[2009 Copa Libertadores]] did not take part in the competition because of scheduling conflicts.

===Qualified by state championships and other competitions===
{| class="wikitable"
! State
! Team
! City
! Qualification criteria
|- 
| rowspan="3" | {{flag|São Paulo}} || [[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]] || [[Campinas]] || [[Campeonato Paulista 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|- 
| [[Guaratinguetá Futebol Ltda|Guaratinguetá]] || [[Guaratinguetá]] || [[Campeonato Paulista 2008|2008 State Championship]] 3rd place<sup>1</sup>
|- 
| [[Clube Atlético Sorocaba|Atlético Sorocaba]]  ||  [[Sorocaba]] || 2008 [[Copa Paulista de Futebol]] winners
|-
| rowspan="3" | {{flag|Rio de Janeiro}} || [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]] || [[Rio de Janeiro]] || [[Campeonato Carioca 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|- 
| [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]] || [[Rio de Janeiro]] || [[Campeonato Carioca 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| [[Americano Futebol Clube|Americano]] || [[Campos dos Goytacazes]] || 2008 Copa Rio runners-up<sup>2</sup>
|- 
| rowspan="3" | {{flag|Rio Grande do Sul}} || [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]] || [[Porto Alegre]] || [[Campeonato Gaúcho 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|- 
| [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]] || [[Caxias do Sul]] || [[Campeonato Gaúcho 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|- 
| [[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa Caxias do Sul|Caxias]] || [[Caxias do Sul]] || 2007 Copa FGF winners
|-
| rowspan="3" | {{flag|Minas Gerais}} || [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]] || [[Belo Horizonte]] || [[Campeonato Mineiro 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| [[Tupi Football Club|Tupi]] || [[Juiz de Fora]] || [[Campeonato Mineiro 2008|2008 State Championship]] 3rd place<sup>3</sup>
|-
| [[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América Mineiro]] || [[Belo Horizonte]] || Taça Minas Gerais runners-up<sup>4</sup>
|- 
| rowspan="3" | {{flag|Paraná}} || [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]] || [[Curitiba]] || [[Campeonato Paranaense 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|- 
| [[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]] || [[Curitiba]] || [[Campeonato Paranaense 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|- 
| [[J. Malucelli Futebol|J. Malucelli]] || [[Curitiba]] || 2008 Copa Paraná winners
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Pernambuco}} || [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]] || [[Recife]] || [[Campeonato Pernambucano 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| [[Central Sport Club|Central]] || [[Caruaru]] || [[Campeonato Pernambucano 2008|2008 State Championship]] 3rd place<sup>5</sup>
|- 
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Bahia}} || [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]] || [[Salvador, Bahia|Salvador]] || [[Campeonato Baiano 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|- 
| [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]] || [[Salvador, Bahia|Salvador]] || [[Campeonato Baiano 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Goiás}} || [[Itumbiara Esporte Clube|Itumbiara]] || [[Itumbiara]] || [[Campeonato Goiano 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]] || [[Goiânia]] || [[Campeonato Goiano 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|- 
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Santa Catarina}} || [[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense]] || [[Florianópolis]] || [[Campeonato Catarinense 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|- 
| [[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]] || [[Criciúma]] || [[Campeonato Catarinense 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|- 
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Ceará}} || [[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]] || [[Fortaleza]] || [[Campeonato Cearense 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Associação Desportiva Recreativa e Cultural Icasa|Icasa]] || [[Juazeiro do Norte]] ||  [[Campeonato Cearense 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|- 
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Pará}} || [[Clube do Remo|Remo]] || [[Belém]] || [[Campeonato Paraense 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|- 
| [[Águia de Marabá Futebol Clube|Águia de Marabá]] || [[Marabá]] || [[Campeonato Paraense 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|-
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Rio Grande do Norte}} || [[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC]] || [[Natal, Rio Grande do Norte|Natal]] || [[Campeonato Potiguar 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Associação Cultural e Desportiva Potiguar|Potiguar]] || [[Mossoró]] || 2008 State Championship runners-up
|- 
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Alagoas}} || [[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA]] || [[Maceió]] || [[Campeonato Alagoano 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|- 
| [[Agremiação Sportiva Arapiraquense|ASA]] || [[Arapiraca]] || [[Campeonato Alagoano 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|- 
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Distrito Federal (Brazil)|name=Distrito Federal}} || [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]] || [[Brasília]] || [[Campeonato Brasiliense 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Esporte Clube Dom Pedro II|Dom Pedro II]] || [[Brasília]] || [[Campeonato Brasiliense 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|- 
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Espírito Santo}} || [[Sociedade Desportiva Serra Futebol Clube|Serra]] || [[Serra, Espírito Santo|Serra]] || [[Campeonato Capixaba 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|- 
| [[Desportiva Capixaba|Desportiva]] || [[Vitória, Brazil|Vitória]] || 2008 Copa Espírito Santo winners
|- 
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Maranhão}} || [[Moto Club de São Luís|Moto Club]] || [[São Luís, Maranhão|São Luís]] || [[Campeonato Maranhense 2008|2008 State Championship]] 1st stage winners
|-
| [[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa]] || [[São Luís, Maranhão|São Luís]] || [[Campeonato Maranhense 2008|2008 State Championship]] 2nd stage winners
|- 
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Paraíba}} || [[Campinense Clube|Campinense]] || [[Campina Grande]] || [[Campeonato Paraibano 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|- 
| [[Nacional Atlético Clube (Patos)|Nacional]] || [[Patos, Paraíba|Patos]] || 2008 Copa Paraíba winners
|- 
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Mato Grosso do Sul}} || [[Ivinhema Futebol Clube|Ivinhema]] || [[Ivinhema]] || [[Campeonato Sul-Matogrossense 2008|State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Misto Esporte Clube|Misto]] || [[Três Lagoas]] || [[Campeonato Sul-Matogrossense 2008|State Championship]] runners-up
|- 
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Amazonas}} || [[Holanda Esporte Clube|Holanda]] || [[Rio Preto da Eva]] || [[Campeonato Amazonense 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|- 
| [[Nacional Fast Clube|Fast Clube]] || [[Manaus]] || [[Campeonato Amazonense 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|- 
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Sergipe}} || [[Associação Desportiva Confiança|Confiança]] || [[Aracaju]] || [[Campeonato Sergipano 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[Associação Olímpica de Itabaiana|Itabaiana]] || [[Itabaiana]] || 2008 Copa Governador João Alves runners-up<sup>6</sup>
|- 
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Piauí}} || [[Barras Futebol Clube|Barras]] || [[Barras, Piauí|Barras]] || [[Campeonato Piauiense 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|- 
| [[Esporte Clube Flamengo|Flamengo]] || [[Teresina]] || 2008 Copa Piauí winners
|- 
| rowspan="2" | {{flag|Mato Grosso}} || [[Mixto Esporte Clube|Mixto]] || [[Cuiabá]] || [[Campeonato Matogrossense 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|-
| [[União Esporte Clube|União]] || [[Rondonópolis]] || [[Campeonato Matogrossense 2008|2008 State Championship]] runners-up
|- 
| {{flag|Acre}} || [[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco]] || [[Rio Branco, Acre|Rio Branco]] || [[Campeonato Acreano 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|- 
| {{flag|Rondônia}} || [[Vilhena Esporte Clube|Vilhena]] || [[Vilhena]] || [[Campeonato Rondoniense 2009|2009 State Championship]] runners-up<sup>7</sup>
|- 
| {{flag|Tocantins}} || [[Tocantins Futebol Clube|Tocantins]] || [[Palmas, Tocantins|Palmas]] || [[Campeonato Tocantinense 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|- 
| {{flag|Amapá}} || [[Cristal Atlético Clube|Cristal]] || [[Macapá]] || [[Campeonato Amapaense 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|- 
| {{flag|Roraima}} || [[Atlético Roraima Clube|Atlético Roraima]] || [[Boa Vista, Roraima|Boa Vista]] || [[Campeonato Roraimense 2008|2008 State Championship]] winners
|}
<small><sup>1</sup> 2008 State Championship winners [[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras]] qualified to [[2009 Copa Libertadores]]<br/>
<sup>2</sup> 2008 Copa Rio winners [[Nova Iguaçu Futebol Clube|Nova Iguaçu]] withdrew.<br/>
<sup>3</sup> 2008 State Championship winners [[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro]] qualified to [[2009 Copa Libertadores]].<br/>
<sup>4</sup> 2008 Taça Minas Gerais winners [[Tupi Football Club|Tupi]] qualified via State Championship.<br/>
<sup>5</sup> 2008 State Championship winners [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport]] qualified to [[2009 Copa Libertadores]].<br/>
<sup>6</sup> 2008 Copa Governador João Alves winners [[Associação Desportiva Confiança|Confiança]] already qualified via State Championship.<br/>
<sup>7</sup> 2008 State Championship winners [[Sport Club Ulbra Ji-Paraná|Ulbra Ji-Paraná]] is now defunct.<br/></small>

===Qualified by CBF club ranking===
{| class="wikitable"
! Pos
! Team
! City
! State
! Points
|-
|align=center| 2 || [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]] || [[São Paulo]] || {{flag|São Paulo}} ||align=right| 1,938
|- 
|align=center| 3 || [[Clube de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco]] || [[Rio de Janeiro]] || {{flag|Rio de Janeiro}} ||align=right| 1,928
|- 
|align=center| 10 || [[Santos Futebol Clube|Santos]] || [[Santos, São Paulo|Santos]] || {{flag|São Paulo}} ||align=right| 1,649
|- 
|align=center| 11 || [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]] || [[Rio de Janeiro]] || {{flag|Rio de Janeiro}} ||align=right| 1,561
|- 
|align=center| 13 || [[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani]] || [[Campinas]] || {{flag|São Paulo}} ||align=right| 1,409
|- 
|align=center| 17 || [[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]] || [[São Paulo]] || {{flag|São Paulo}} ||align=right| 1,284
|- 
|align=center| 21 || [[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz]] || [[Recife]] || {{flag|Pernambuco}} ||align=right| 1,132
|- 
|align=center| 23 || [[Paraná Clube|Paraná]] || [[Curitiba]] || {{flag|Paraná}} ||align=right| 978
|- 
|align=center| 25 || [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]] || [[Fortaleza]] || {{flag|Ceará}} ||align=right| 936
|- 
|align=center| 30 || [[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América de Natal]] || [[Natal, Rio Grande do Norte|Natal]] || {{flag|Rio Grande do Norte}} ||align=right| 651
|}

==Stages 1&ndash;4==
Teams that play in their home stadium in the first leg are marked with †.

===Section 1===
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals
| RD1-team01={{flagicon|Piauí}} [[Esporte Clube Flamengo|Flamengo-PI]] †
| RD1-score01-1=1
| RD1-score01-2=-
| RD1-score01-agg=1
| RD1-team02={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]'''
| RD1-score02-1=4
| RD1-score02-2=-
| RD1-score02-agg=4
| RD1-team03={{flagicon|Pernambuco}} '''[[Central Sport Club|Central]]''' † ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD1-score03-1=0
| RD1-score03-2=1
| RD1-score03-agg=1
| RD1-team04={{flagicon|Ceará}} [[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará]]
| RD1-score04-1=0
| RD1-score04-2=1
| RD1-score04-agg=1
| RD1-team05={{flagicon|Ceará}} '''[[Associação Desportiva Recreativa e Cultural Icasa|Icasa]]''' † ([[Penalty shootout (association football)|p]])
| RD1-score05-1=1
| RD1-score05-2=1
| RD1-score05-agg=2 (4)
| RD1-team06={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa]]
| RD1-score06-1=1
| RD1-score06-2=1
| RD1-score06-agg=2 (3)
| RD1-team07={{flagicon|Sergipe}} '''[[Associação Desportiva Confiança|Confiança]]''' †
| RD1-score07-1=3
| RD1-score07-2=0
| RD1-score07-agg=3
| RD1-team08={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} [[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América de Natal]]
| RD1-score08-1=2
| RD1-score08-2=0
| RD1-score08-agg=2
| RD1-team09={{flagicon|Sergipe}} [[Associação Olímpica de Itabaiana|Itabaiana]] †
| RD1-score09-1=0
| RD1-score09-2=-
| RD1-score09-agg=0
| RD1-team10={{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''
| RD1-score10-1=5
| RD1-score10-2=-
| RD1-score10-agg=5
| RD1-team11={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Guaratinguetá Futebol Ltda|Guaratinguetá]]''' †
| RD1-score11-1=2
| RD1-score11-2=1
| RD1-score11-agg=3
| RD1-team12={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa Caxias do Sul|Caxias]]
| RD1-score12-1=0
| RD1-score12-2=2
| RD1-score12-agg=2
| RD1-team13={{flagicon|Alagoas}} [[Agremiação Sportiva Arapiraquense|ASA]] †
| RD1-score13-1=1
| RD1-score13-2=1
| RD1-score13-agg=1 (4)
| RD1-team14={{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]''' ([[Penalty shootout (association football)|p]])
| RD1-score14-1=1
| RD1-score14-2=1
| RD1-score14-agg=1 (5)
| RD1-team15={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Clube Atlético Sorocaba|Atlético Sorocaba]] †
| RD1-score15-1=1
| RD1-score15-2=0
| RD1-score15-agg=1
| RD1-team16={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]]'''
| RD1-score16-1=0
| RD1-score16-2=2
| RD1-score16-agg=2
| RD2-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]'''
| RD2-score01-1=3
| RD2-score01-2=-
| RD2-score01-agg=3
| RD2-team02={{flagicon|Pernambuco}} [[Central Sport Club|Central]] †
| RD2-score02-1=0
| RD2-score02-2=-
| RD2-score02-agg=0
| RD2-team03={{flagicon|Ceará}} '''[[Associação Desportiva Recreativa e Cultural Icasa|Icasa]]''' †
| RD2-score03-1=0
| RD2-score03-2=2
| RD2-score03-agg=2
| RD2-team04={{flagicon|Sergipe}} [[Associação Desportiva Confiança|Confiança]] 
| RD2-score04-1=0
| RD2-score04-2=1
| RD2-score04-agg=1
| RD2-team05={{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} '''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]'''
| RD2-score05-1=2
| RD2-score05-2=2
| RD2-score05-agg=4
| RD2-team06={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Guaratinguetá Futebol Ltda|Guaratinguetá]] †
| RD2-score06-1=2
| RD2-score06-2=0
| RD2-score06-agg=2
| RD2-team07={{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]'''
| RD2-score07-1=2
| RD2-score07-2=1
| RD2-score07-agg=3
| RD2-team08={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude]] †
| RD2-score08-1=1
| RD2-score08-2=1
| RD2-score08-agg=2
| RD3-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]''' †
| RD3-score01-1=1
| RD3-score01-2=4
| RD3-score01-agg=5
| RD3-team02={{flagicon|Ceará}} [[Associação Desportiva Recreativa e Cultural Icasa|Icasa]]
| RD3-score02-1=1
| RD3-score02-2=1
| RD3-score02-agg=2
| RD3-team03={{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]]
| RD3-score03-1=0
| RD3-score03-2=3
| RD3-score03-agg=3 (4)
| RD3-team04={{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]''' † ([[Penalty shootout (association football)|p]])
| RD3-score04-1=3
| RD3-score04-2=0
| RD3-score04-agg=3 (5)
| RD4-team01= {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]]''' †
| RD4-score01-1=4
| RD4-score01-2=1
| RD4-score01-agg=5
| RD4-team02= {{flagicon|Bahia}} [[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória]]
| RD4-score02-1=0
| RD4-score02-2=1
| RD4-score02-agg=1
}}

===Section 2===
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals
| RD1-team01={{flagicon|Goiás}} [[Itumbiara Esporte Clube|Itumbiara]] †
| RD1-score01-1=0
| RD1-score01-2=-
| RD1-score01-agg=0
| RD1-team02={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''
| RD1-score02-1=2
| RD1-score02-2=-
| RD1-score02-agg=2
| RD1-team03={{flagicon|Mato Grosso do Sul}} '''[[Misto Esporte Clube|Misto]]''' † ([[Penalty shootout (association football)|p]])
| RD1-score03-1=1
| RD1-score03-2=1
| RD1-score03-agg=1 (3)
| RD1-team04={{flagicon|Paraíba}} [[Campinense Clube|Campinense]]
| RD1-score04-1=1
| RD1-score04-2=1
| RD1-score04-agg=1 (2)
| RD1-team05={{flagicon|Tocantins}} [[Tocantins Futebol Clube|Tocantins]] †
| RD1-score05-1=0
| RD1-score05-2=-
| RD1-score05-agg=0
| RD1-team06={{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]]'''
| RD1-score06-1=3
| RD1-score06-2=-
| RD1-score06-agg=3
| RD1-team07={{flagicon|Amazonas}} [[Nacional Fast Clube|Fast Clube]] †
| RD1-score07-1=1
| RD1-score07-2=0
| RD1-score07-agg=1
| RD1-team08={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} '''[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC]]'''
| RD1-score08-1=1
| RD1-score08-2=4
| RD1-score08-agg=5
| RD1-team09={{flagicon|Paraíba}} [[Nacional Atlético Clube (Patos)|Nacional]] †
| RD1-score09-1=0
| RD1-score09-2=0
| RD1-score09-agg=0
| RD1-team10={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]]'''
| RD1-score10-1=1
| RD1-score10-2=3
| RD1-score10-agg=4
| RD1-team11={{flagicon|Pará}} '''[[Águia de Marabá Futebol Clube|Águia de Marabá]]''' †
| RD1-score11-1=2
| RD1-score11-2=1
| RD1-score11-agg=3
| RD1-team12={{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América Mineiro]]
| RD1-score12-1=1
| RD1-score12-2=0
| RD1-score12-agg=1
| RD1-team13={{flagicon|Roraima}} [[Atlético Roraima Clube|Atlético Roraima]] †
| RD1-score13-1=1
| RD1-score13-2=-
| RD1-score13-agg=1
| RD1-team14={{flagicon|Goiás}} '''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]'''
| RD1-score14-1=3
| RD1-score14-2=-
| RD1-score14-agg=3
| RD1-team15={{flagicon|Amapá}} [[Cristal Atlético Clube|Cristal]] †
| RD1-score15-1=1
| RD1-score15-2=1
| RD1-score15-agg=2
| RD1-team16={{flagicon|Distrito Federal (Brazil)}} '''[[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]]'''
| RD1-score16-1=2
| RD1-score16-2=3
| RD1-score16-agg=5
| RD2-team01={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''
| RD2-score01-1=2
| RD2-score01-2=-
| RD2-score01-agg=2
| RD2-team02={{flagicon|Mato Grosso do Sul}} [[Misto Esporte Clube|Misto]] †
| RD2-score02-1=0
| RD2-score02-2=-
| RD2-score02-agg=0
| RD2-team03={{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]]'''
| RD2-score03-1=2
| RD2-score03-2=3
| RD2-score03-agg=5
| RD2-team04={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} [[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC]] †
| RD2-score04-1=2
| RD2-score04-2=1
| RD2-score04-agg=3
| RD2-team05={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]]'''
| RD2-score05-1=1
| RD2-score05-2=3
| RD2-score05-agg=4
| RD2-team06={{flagicon|Pará}} [[Águia de Marabá Futebol Clube|Águia de Marabá]] †
| RD2-score06-1=2
| RD2-score06-2=0
| RD2-score06-agg=2
| RD2-team07={{flagicon|Goiás}} '''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]]'''
| RD2-score07-1=1
| RD2-score07-2=4
| RD2-score07-agg=5
| RD2-team08={{flagicon|Distrito Federal (Brazil)}} [[Brasiliense Futebol Clube|Brasiliense]] †
| RD2-score08-1=0
| RD2-score08-2=1
| RD2-score08-agg=1
| RD3-team01='''{{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''
| RD3-score01-1=2
| RD3-score01-2=2
| RD3-score01-agg=4
| RD3-team02={{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético Paranaense]] †
| RD3-score02-1=3
| RD3-score02-2=0
| RD3-score02-agg=3
| RD3-team03={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]]''' ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD3-score03-1=2
| RD3-score03-2=1
| RD3-score03-agg=3
| RD3-team04={{flagicon|Goiás}} [[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás]] †
| RD3-score04-1=2
| RD3-score04-2=1
| RD3-score04-agg=3
| RD4-team01={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]''' †
| RD4-score01-1=1
| RD4-score01-2=2
| RD4-score01-agg=3
| RD4-team02={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense]]
| RD4-score02-1=0
| RD4-score02-2=2
| RD4-score02-agg=2
}}

===Section 3===
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals
| RD1-team01={{flagicon|Distrito Federal (Brazil)}} [[Esporte Clube Dom Pedro II|Dom Pedro II]] †
| RD1-score01-1=0
| RD1-score01-2=-
| RD1-score01-agg=0
| RD1-team02={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]'''
| RD1-score02-1=2
| RD1-score02-2=-
| RD1-score02-agg=2
| RD1-team03={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Americano Futebol Clube|Americano]]''' †
| RD1-score03-1=2
| RD1-score03-2=4
| RD1-score03-agg=6
| RD1-team04={{flagicon|Pernambuco}} [[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz]]
| RD1-score04-1=0
| RD1-score04-2=2
| RD1-score04-agg=2
| RD1-team05={{flagicon|Rondônia}} [[Vilhena Esporte Clube|Vilhena]] †
| RD1-score05-1=1
| RD1-score05-2=1
| RD1-score05-agg=2
| RD1-team06={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]]'''
| RD1-score06-1=2
| RD1-score06-2=6
| RD1-score06-agg=8
| RD1-team07={{flagicon|Maranhão}} [[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa]] †
| RD1-score07-1=3
| RD1-score07-2=1
| RD1-score07-agg=4
| RD1-team08={{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} '''[[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense]]''' ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD1-score08-1=2
| RD1-score08-2=2
| RD1-score08-agg=4
| RD1-team09={{flagicon|Acre}} [[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco]] †
| RD1-score09-1=1
| RD1-score09-2=0
| RD1-score09-agg=1
| RD1-team10={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Santos Futebol Clube|Santos]]'''
| RD1-score10-1=2
| RD1-score10-2=4
| RD1-score10-agg=6
| RD1-team11={{flagicon|Espírito Santo}} [[Sociedade Desportiva Serra Futebol Clube|Serra]] †
| RD1-score11-1=2
| RD1-score11-2=1
| RD1-score11-agg=3
| RD1-team12={{flagicon|Alagoas}} '''[[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA]]'''
| RD1-score12-1=3
| RD1-score12-2=3
| RD1-score12-agg=6
| RD1-team13={{flagicon|Amazonas}} [[Holanda Esporte Clube|Holanda]] †
| RD1-score13-1=1
| RD1-score13-2=0
| RD1-score13-agg=1
| RD1-team14={{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]'''
| RD1-score14-1=2
| RD1-score14-2=3
| RD1-score14-agg=5
| RD1-team15={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Norte}} [[Associação Cultural e Desportiva Potiguar|Potiguar]] †
| RD1-score15-1=2
| RD1-score15-2=1
| RD1-score15-agg=3
| RD1-team16={{flagicon|Bahia}} '''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]]'''
| RD1-score16-1=2
| RD1-score16-2=6
| RD1-score16-agg=8
| RD2-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo]]
| RD2-score01-1=1
| RD2-score01-2=2
| RD2-score01-agg=3 (4)
| RD2-team02={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Americano Futebol Clube|Americano]]''' † ([[Penalty shootout (association football)|p]])
| RD2-score02-1=2
| RD2-score02-2=1
| RD2-score02-agg=3 (5)
| RD2-team03={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]]''' ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD2-score03-1=2
| RD2-score03-2=0
| RD2-score03-agg=2
| RD2-team04={{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} [[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense]] †
| RD2-score04-1=2
| RD2-score04-2=0
| RD2-score04-agg=2
| RD2-team05={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Santos Futebol Clube|Santos]]
| RD2-score05-1=0
| RD2-score05-2=0
| RD2-score05-agg=0
| RD2-team06={{flagicon|Alagoas}} '''[[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA]]''' †
| RD2-score06-1=0
| RD2-score06-2=1
| RD2-score06-agg=1
| RD2-team07={{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]''' ([[Away goals rule|a]])
| RD2-score07-1=2
| RD2-score07-2=0
| RD2-score07-agg=4
| RD2-team08={{flagicon|Bahia}} [[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia]] †
| RD2-score08-1=2
| RD2-score08-2=0
| RD2-score08-agg=4
| RD3-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Americano Futebol Clube|Americano]] †
| RD3-score01-1=0
| RD3-score01-2=1
| RD3-score01-agg=1
| RD3-team02='''{{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]]'''
| RD3-score02-1=0
| RD3-score02-2=2
| RD3-score02-agg=2
| RD3-team03={{flagicon|Alagoas}} [[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA]] †
| RD3-score03-1=0
| RD3-score03-2=0
| RD3-score03-agg=0
| RD3-team04='''{{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]'''
| RD3-score04-1=4
| RD3-score04-2=3
| RD3-score04-agg=7
| RD4-team01={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]] †
| RD4-score01-1=2
| RD4-score01-2=0
| RD4-score01-agg=2
| RD4-team02={{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]'''
| RD4-score02-1=2
| RD4-score02-2=1
| RD4-score02-agg=3
}}

===Section 4===
{{16TeamBracket|legs=2|aggregate=y|seeds=n
| RD1= First Round
| RD2= Second Round
| RD3= Round of 16
| RD4= Quarterfinals
| RD1-team01={{flagicon|Mato Grosso do Sul}} [[Ivinhema Futebol Clube|Ivinhema]] †
| RD1-score01-1=0
| RD1-score01-2=-
| RD1-score01-agg=0
| RD1-team02={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''
| RD1-score02-1=5
| RD1-score02-2=-
| RD1-score02-agg=5
| RD1-team03={{flagicon|Piauí}} [[Barras Futebol Clube|Barras]] †
| RD1-score03-1=0
| RD1-score03-2=0
| RD1-score03-agg=0
| RD1-team04={{flagicon|Pará}} '''[[Clube do Remo|Remo]]'''
| RD1-score04-1=1
| RD1-score04-2=2
| RD1-score04-agg=3
| RD1-team05={{flagicon|Mato Grosso}} [[Mixto Esporte Clube|Mixto]] †
| RD1-score05-1=1
| RD1-score05-2=2
| RD1-score05-agg=3 (2)
| RD1-team06={{flagicon|Paraná}} '''[[Paraná Clube|Paraná]]''' ([[Penalty shootout (association football)|p]])
| RD1-score06-1=2
| RD1-score06-2=1
| RD1-score06-agg=3 (4)
| RD1-team07={{flagicon|Espírito Santo}} [[Desportiva Capixaba|Desportiva]] †
| RD1-score07-1=1
| RD1-score07-2=0
| RD1-score07-agg=1
| RD1-team08={{flagicon|Ceará}} '''[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]]'''
| RD1-score08-1=1
| RD1-score08-2=3
| RD1-score08-agg=4
| RD1-team09={{flagicon|Mato Grosso}} [[União Esporte Clube|União]] †
| RD1-score09-1=1
| RD1-score09-2=0
| RD1-score09-agg=1
| RD1-team10={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]'''
| RD1-score10-1=0
| RD1-score10-2=2
| RD1-score10-agg=2
| RD1-team11={{flagicon|Paraná}} [[J. Malucelli Futebol|J. Malucelli]] †
| RD1-score11-1=0
| RD1-score11-2=-
| RD1-score11-agg=0
| RD1-team12={{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani]]'''
| RD1-score12-1=2
| RD1-score12-2=-
| RD1-score12-agg=2
| RD1-team13={{flagicon|Maranhão}} [[Moto Club de São Luís|Moto Club]] †
| RD1-score13-1=1
| RD1-score13-2=0
| RD1-score13-agg=1
| RD1-team14={{flagicon|Pernambuco}} '''[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]]'''
| RD1-score14-1=1
| RD1-score14-2=2
| RD1-score14-agg=3
| RD1-team15={{flagicon|Minas Gerais}} [[Tupi Football Club|Tupi]] †
| RD1-score15-1=2
| RD1-score15-2=0
| RD1-score15-agg=2
| RD1-team16={{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} '''[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]]'''
| RD1-score16-1=0
| RD1-score16-2=3
| RD1-score16-agg=3
| RD2-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} '''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]'''
| RD2-score01-1=2
| RD2-score01-2=-
| RD2-score01-agg=2
| RD2-team02={{flagicon|Pará}} [[Clube do Remo|Remo]] †
| RD2-score02-1=0
| RD2-score02-2=-
| RD2-score02-agg=0
| RD2-team03={{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Paraná Clube|Paraná]]
| RD2-score03-1=1
| RD2-score03-2=1
| RD2-score03-agg=2
| RD2-team04={{flagicon|Ceará}} '''[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]]''' †
| RD2-score04-1=2
| RD2-score04-2=1
| RD2-score04-agg=3
| RD2-team05={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]'''
| RD2-score05-1=2
| RD2-score05-2=5
| RD2-score05-agg=7
| RD2-team06={{flagicon|São Paulo}} [[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani]] †
| RD2-score06-1=1
| RD2-score06-2=0
| RD2-score06-agg=1
| RD2-team07={{flagicon|Pernambuco}} '''[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]]'''
| RD2-score07-1=2
| RD2-score07-2=3
| RD2-score07-agg=5
| RD2-team08={{flagicon|Santa Catarina}} [[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]] †
| RD2-score08-1=2
| RD2-score08-2=2
| RD2-score08-agg=4
| RD3-team01='''{{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]]''' †
| RD3-score01-1=0
| RD3-score01-2=3
| RD3-score01-agg=3
| RD3-team02={{flagicon|Ceará}} [[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza]]
| RD3-score02-1=0
| RD3-score02-2=0
| RD3-score02-agg=0
| RD3-team03='''{{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]'''
| RD3-score03-1=3
| RD3-score03-2=2
| RD3-score03-agg=5
| RD3-team04={{flagicon|Pernambuco}} [[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico]] †
| RD3-score04-1=0
| RD3-score04-2=0
| RD3-score04-agg=0
| RD4-team01={{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]] †
| RD4-score01-1=0
| RD4-score01-2=1
| RD4-score01-agg=1
| RD4-team02={{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]'''
| RD4-score02-1=0
| RD4-score02-2=2
| RD4-score02-agg=2
}}

==Stages 5 and 6==
Teams that play in their home stadium in the first leg are marked with †.
{{football squad on pitch|align=right
| GK      = [[Luiz Felipe Ventura dos Santos|Felipe]]
| RB      = [[Alessandro Mori Nunes|Alessandro]]
| RCB     = [[Anderson Sebastião Cardoso|Chicão]]
| LCB     = [[William Machado de Oliveira|William (c)]]
| LB      = [[André Clarindo dos Santos|André<br />Santos]]
| DM      = [[Cristian Oliveira Baroni|Cristian]]
| RCM     = [[Elias Mendes Trindade|Elias]]
| LCM     = [[Douglas (footballer, born 1982)|Douglas]]
| LW      = [[Dentinho]]
| RW      = [[Jorge Henrique de Souza|Jorge<br />Henrique]]
| CF      = [[Ronaldo Luís Nazário de Lima|Ronaldo]]
| caption = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]] starting 11
}}
{{4TeamBracket-2legs
| RD1          = Semifinals
| RD2          = Final
| RD1-team1    = {{flagicon|Rio de Janeiro}} [[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco da Gama]] †
| RD1-score1-1 = 1
| RD1-score1-2 = 0
| RD1-score1-A = 1
| RD1-team2    = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''
| RD1-score2-1 = 1
| RD1-score2-2 = 0
| RD1-score2-A = 1
| RD1-team3    = {{flagicon|Paraná}} [[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba]]
| RD1-score3-1 = 1
| RD1-score3-2 = 1
| RD1-score3-A = 2
| RD1-team4    = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} '''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]''' †
| RD1-score4-1 = 3
| RD1-score4-2 = 0
| RD1-score4-A = 3
| RD2-team1    = {{flagicon|São Paulo}} '''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]''' †
| RD2-score1-1 = 2
| RD2-score1-2 = 2
| RD2-score1-A = 4
| RD2-team2    = {{flagicon|Rio Grande do Sul}} [[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional]]
| RD2-score2-1 = 0
| RD2-score2-2 = 2
| RD2-score2-A = 2
}}
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />2009 Champion
|-
|{{flagicon|São Paulo|size=100px}}<br>'''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]]'''<br/>'''3rd Title'''
|}

==References==
{{reflist}}

==External links==
*[https://web.archive.org/web/20090306071627/http://www.cbf.com.br/regulamento/regulamento_cb2009.pdf Copa do Brasil regulations] {{in lang|pt}}

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}
{{2009 in Brazilian football}}
{{2009 in South American Football (CONMEBOL)}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 2009}}
[[Category:2009 in domestic association football cups]]
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|2009]]
[[Category:2009 Brazilian football competitions]]
